dashboard.label: Asset Health Correlation
dashboard.description: Correlate endpoint availability with other Splunk data sources

search.query: | inputlookup ping_monitor_settings_lookup | where _key="global" | head 1 | eval index=coalesce(index, "ping"), sourcetype=coalesce(sourcetype, "ping_monitor"), metrics_index=coalesce(metrics_index, "ping_metrics")
| inputlookup ping_health_lookup.csv | stats count as lookup_count

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats latest(_time) as last_check, latest(packet_loss_pct) as packet_loss, latest(avg_latency_ms) as latency, latest(target_ip) as ip_address, latest(group) as group, latest(entitytype) as entitytype, latest(device) as device, latest(vendor) as vendor by hostname | eval health_status = case( packet_loss == 0, "Healthy", packet_loss > 0 AND packet_loss < 50, "Degraded", packet_loss >= 50 AND packet_loss < 100, "Critical", packet_loss == 100, "Down", true(), "Unknown" ) | eval health_icon = case( health_status == "Healthy", "✅", health_status == "Degraded", "⚠️", health_status == "Critical", "🔶", health_status == "Down", "❌", true(), "❓" ) | eval last_check_human = strftime(last_check, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval latency_display = if(latency > 0, round(latency, 2)." ms", "N/A") | table health_icon, hostname, ip_address, health_status, packet_loss, latency_display, group, entitytype, device, vendor, last_check_human | rename health_icon as " ", packet_loss as "Packet Loss %", latency_display as "Latency", last_check_human as "Last Check" | sort health_status, hostname

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats latest(packet_loss_pct) as packet_loss by hostname | eval health_status = case( packet_loss == 0, "Healthy", packet_loss > 0 AND packet_loss < 50, "Degraded", packet_loss >= 50 AND packet_loss < 100, "Critical", packet_loss == 100, "Down", true(), "Unknown" ) | stats count by health_status

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | eval health_status = case( packet_loss_pct == 0, "Healthy", packet_loss_pct > 0 AND packet_loss_pct < 50, "Degraded", packet_loss_pct >= 50 AND packet_loss_pct < 100, "Critical", packet_loss_pct == 100, "Down", true(), "Unknown" ) | timechart span=1h count by health_status

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary packet_loss_pct>0 | stats latest(packet_loss_pct) as packet_loss, latest(avg_latency_ms) as latency, latest(target_ip) as ip, latest(group) as group, latest(entitytype) as entitytype by hostname | eval health_status = case( packet_loss > 0 AND packet_loss < 50, "⚠️ Degraded", packet_loss >= 50 AND packet_loss < 100, "🔶 Critical", packet_loss == 100, "❌ Down" ) | eval latency = round(latency, 2) | table health_status, hostname, ip, packet_loss, latency, group, entitytype | rename health_status as "Status", packet_loss as "Loss %", latency as "Latency ms" | sort -packet_loss

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats latest(packet_loss_pct) as packet_loss, dc(hostname) as asset_count by entitytype | eval healthy = if(packet_loss == 0, 1, 0) | eventstats sum(healthy) as healthy_count, sum(asset_count) as total by entitytype | eval health_pct = round((healthy_count / total) * 100, 1) | eval status = case( health_pct >= 99, "✅ Excellent", health_pct >= 90, "🟢 Good", health_pct >= 75, "⚠️ Degraded", health_pct >= 50, "🔶 Impaired", true(), "❌ Critical" ) | stats first(asset_count) as assets, first(health_pct) as health_pct, first(status) as status by entitytype | sort -health_pct | rename entitytype as "Entity Type", assets as "Assets", health_pct as "Health %", status as "Status"

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats latest(packet_loss_pct) as packet_loss, dc(hostname) as asset_count by group | eval healthy = if(packet_loss == 0, 1, 0) | eventstats sum(healthy) as healthy_count, sum(asset_count) as total by group | eval health_pct = round((healthy_count / total) * 100, 1) | eval status = case( health_pct >= 99, "✅ Excellent", health_pct >= 90, "🟢 Good", health_pct >= 75, "⚠️ Degraded", health_pct >= 50, "🔶 Impaired", true(), "❌ Critical" ) | stats first(asset_count) as assets, first(health_pct) as health_pct, first(status) as status by group | sort -health_pct | rename group as "Group", assets as "Assets", health_pct as "Health %", status as "Status"

div.h4: 💡 Using Health Data in Other Searches
div.p: You can enrich any Splunk search with ping health data using the lookup table. Example:
div.pre: index=your_index | lookup ping_health_lookup.csv hostname OUTPUT health_status, packet_loss_pct, avg_latency_ms
div.p: The health lookup is automatically populated when you run Setup. You can also enable the "Ping Monitor - Update Health Lookup" saved search for automatic updates every 5 minutes.

search.query: | inputlookup ping_health_lookup.csv | eval health_icon = case( health_status == "Healthy", "✅", health_status == "Degraded", "⚠️", health_status == "Critical", "🔶", health_status == "Down", "❌", true(), "❓" ) | table health_icon, hostname, target_ip, group, entitytype, health_status, packet_loss_pct, avg_latency_ms | rename health_icon as " ", packet_loss_pct as "Loss %", avg_latency_ms as "Latency ms" | sort health_status, hostname
